allow:
Bash(for dir in ~/projects/ghost ~/projects/biography ~/projects/ai-networking-system ~/projects/audio-intelligence-pipeline ~/projects/project-init-skill; do
  echo "=== $\(basename $dir\) ==="
  git -C "$dir" log --oneline -10 2>/dev/null || echo "\(not a git repo or no commits\)"
  echo ""
done)

Bash(for dir in ~/projects/ghost ~/projects/biography ~/projects/ai-networking-system ~/projects/audio-intelligence-pipeline ~/projects/project-init-skill; do
  echo "=== $\(basename $dir\) ==="
  git -C "$dir" status --short 2>/dev/null || echo "\(not a git repo\)"
  git -C "$dir" log --oneline --merges -5 2>/dev/null | grep -q "Merge" && echo "Has merge commits" || true
  echo ""
done)
